hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && grep -n 'console\.log' "$f" && echo '[Hook] console.log detecte - a supprimer avant commit' >&2 || true; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && npx tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.app.json 2>&1 | head -20 || true; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(npm run build|npm run test|npm install)' && [ -z "$TMUX" ] && echo '[Hook] Conseil : utilise tmux pour les commandes longues (tmux new -s dev)' >&2 || true; } 2>/dev/null || true
